Qazaq IRThe First Agglutinative Intermediate Representation

Achieving O(1) Deterministic LLM Code Generation without Hallucinations.

The Whitepaper
View Architecture

🌌 The Origin

Moving away from English-based O(n²) bottlenecks towards mathematical certainty.

🏗 Architecture

Farewell ASTs. Welcome linear tokens, immutable roots, and isolated suffixes.

⚙️ Core Engine

Absolute O(1) BitFlags validation capability for handling 100k+ Transactions Per Second.
